creator: araujobsdport@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, Aug 10, 2009 at 09:58:14PM +0400, Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
 > * Marcelo Araujo (araujo@FreeBSD.org) wrote:
 > 
 > >   Modified files:
 > >     shells/lshell        Makefile 
 > >   Added files:
 > >     shells/lshell        pkg-plist 
 > >   Log:
 > >   - Add lshell in /etc/shells.
 > >   - Fix the PORTDOCS issue.
 > >   - Bump PORTREVISION.
 > >   
 > >   PR:             ports/137551
 > >   Submitted by:   Sylvio Cesar <scjamorim@bsd.com.br> (maintainer)
 > >   Reported by:    erwin, pav (pointyhat)
 > 
 > Nice, I was just about to complain on that.
 > 
 > Also, _DEPENDS lines are not needed, USE_PYTHON implies this.
 > 
 > Also, are you sure
 > 
 > @dirrmtry %%DATADIR%%
 > @dirrmtry %%LOGDIR%%
 > 
 > are needed when LOGDIR is not even defined (and judging from plist,
 > there's no DATADIR).
 
 Hello Dmitry,
 
 Thanks to have noted the _DEPENDS mistake.
 Soon as possible I'll fix it.
 
 Cheers,
 -- 
 Marcelo Araujo
 araujo@FreeBSD.org
 http://www.FreeBSD.org
 Most people want to be delivered from temptation but
 would like it to keep in touch.
